btc_dominance.label: BTC dominance
btc_dominance.subnote: BTC market cap ÷ CoinPaprika total market cap

stablecoin_share.label: Stablecoin share
stablecoin_share.subnote: Stablecoin market cap ÷ top-50 list market cap

story_callout.title: How to read this snapshot
bullets: KPI strip: Total market cap and its 1M % come from CoinPaprika. BTC dominance compares Bitcoin’s market cap to that total; stablecoin share is the portion of this page’s top-50 list held by stablecoins.
Chart: TradingView TOTAL tracks a broad crypto market-cap index (about the top 125 coins). Use it for trend context; its level can differ from the KPI total because sources and universes differ.
Table: Spot prices, 1M % changes, and categories use the top-50 CoinGecko list (CoinCap fallback when 30-day change is missing). Hover tickers for short About summaries.

source_note: Total market cap and its 1M change come from CoinPaprika global market data and 30-day market-overview history. BTC dominance uses Bitcoin’s market cap vs that CoinPaprika total; stablecoin share is stablecoin market cap vs the sum of this top-50 list. Coin price changes use CoinGecko spot data with CoinCap fallback for rows that do not include a 30-day change.
